overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character in winter clothing walking across a wooden dock and climbing a snowy mountain at night. The scene features falling snow, starry skies, and a large rock formation with the character ascending the cliff face.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden pier over frozen water at mountain base

events.description: character turns and begins walking along the wooden dock toward the mountain

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden dock toward the distant mountain peak

entered.detail: small wooden structure at the start of the pier with snow-covered roof
weathered wooden dock extending over the water toward the mountain
dark frozen water surrounding the pier with snow dusting the surface
tall snow-covered mountain peak towering in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character stands on a wooden pier extending over frozen water, with a small dock house visible to the left. Snow falls gently as the character walks forward along the planks toward a massive mountain peak in the distance, with wooden railings lining both sides of the narrow dock.

events.description: character steps off wooden dock onto grassy shore at mountain base

agents.ego_description: walking across the snowy grass toward the base of the mountain

entered.detail: snow-dusted grass at the water's edge leading to the mountain
dark rocky outcroppings at the base of the mountain face

segments.scene_description: Leaving the wooden dock behind, the character walks onto a grassy shore at the base of the mountain. The ground transitions from planks to snow-covered grass as the character approaches the dark rock face, with the mountain summit looming closer ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep vertical rock face of mountain

events.description: character jumps and begins climbing up the vertical rock face

agents.ego_description: climbing steadily up the steep rock face using hands and feet

entered.detail: steep dark rock wall with snow patches that the character is climbing

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from walking to climbing, grasping the vertical rock face and ascending the mountain. The camera follows from behind as the character climbs higher, with the mountain summit drawing closer and the starry night sky visible above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a quiet frozen waterfront to a vertical ascent up a massive mountain peak under a starry night sky. It begins with the character walking along a narrow wooden pier over frozen water, passing a small dock house as snow falls gently. As the character reaches the end of the planks, the scene shifts to a snowy, grassy shore at the base of the mountain, with the dark rock face looming closer. The movement then evolves from a walk into a climb as the character grasps the vertical cliff, ascending higher toward the summit while the vast starry sky opens up above.
